deep_dive.title: Empowering Feed-Forward Reconstruction Models with Metric Scale via Satellite Images
deep_dive.abstract: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction models have recently shown strong generalization across diverse scenes, yet most of them recover geometry only up to an unknown global scale. This scale ambiguity limits their use in applications that require metric understanding of the environment. Existing metric reconstruction methods commonly rely on large-scale metric annotations or accurate camera calibration, both of which are costly or unreliable in many real-world settings. We propose a satellite-guided framework for resolving scale ambiguity in feed-forward 3D reconstruction. The key idea is to use readily available satellite imagery as a global metric reference. Given a coarse camera pose, our method retrieves a local satellite patch and integrates it with a feed-forward reconstruction backbone through bidirectional cross-view interaction. By enforcing consistency between the reconstructed scene and the satellite reference, the model infers absolute scale, refines scene geometry, and estimates camera pose in a metric coordinate frame. Experiments on KITTI, nuScenes, and Oxford RobotCar show consistent improvements in metric depth estimation, multi-view point-cloud reconstruction, and cross-view camera localization, while preserving strong generalization across datasets and geographic regions.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Directly addresses feed-forward 3D reconstruction models and resolves metric scale ambiguity with satellite guidance
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 直接解决前馈3D重建模型的尺度模糊，利用卫星图像提供度量参考
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 直接解决前馈3D重建模型的尺度模糊，利用卫星图像提供度量参考
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 直接解决前馈3D重建模型的尺度模糊，利用卫星图像提供度量参考
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Empowers feed-forward 3D reconstruction models with metric scale via satellite imagery, enabling accurate geometry without costly annotations.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对前馈3D重建模型缺乏真实尺度的问题，提出利用卫星图像作为全局度量参考。方法从粗姿态获取局部卫星图，并将其融入重建流程，无需度量标注或精确标定。实验证明该方法可有效恢复度量尺度，提升实用场景的几何精度。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对前馈3D重建模型缺乏真实尺度的问题，提出利用卫星图像作为全局度量参考。方法从粗姿态获取局部卫星图，并将其融入重建流程，无需度量标注或精确标定。实验证明该方法可有效恢复度量尺度，提升实用场景的几何精度。

deep_dive.title: GVC-Seg: Training-Free 3D Instance Segmentation via Geometric Visual Correspondence
deep_dive.abstract: Accurate 3D instance segmentation in point cloud data is critical for machine vision applications. Recent advancements leverage multiple pre-trained foundation models to generate 3D proposals, followed by the application of proposal aggregation methods, which significantly enhance performance. However, they often produce sub-optimal results due to inherent variations in confidence levels across different segmentation models, resulting in a bias toward the model with higher confidence. This bias is inherently model-dependent and is influenced by factors such as data preprocessing techniques and training strategies. To address this bias, we propose a novel, training-free 3D instance segmentation approach via Geometric Visual Correspondence (GVC-Seg), which exploits the correspondence between 3D geometric cues and 2D visual cues to mitigate the confidence bias. Additionally, a 3D proposal generation module and a mask-aware CLIP feature extraction module are introduced during the instance mask generation and instance semantic reasoning, respectively. In this way, GVC-Seg enhances proposal quality assessment, ensuring unbiased ensemble learning across different models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on several challenging benchmarks, while also exhibiting strong potential in open-vocabulary semantic segmentation settings.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: training-free 3D instance segmentation via geometric visual correspondence
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于几何视觉对应的免训练3D实例分割
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于几何视觉对应的免训练3D实例分割
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于几何视觉对应的免训练3D实例分割
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes GVC-Seg, a training-free 3D instance segmentation method using geometric visual correspondence to overcome model bias, achieving robust segmentation without retraining.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有基于预训练模型的3D实例分割方法因不同模型置信度差异导致模型偏差。本文提出GVC-Seg，一种免训练的3D实例分割方法，通过几何视觉对应缓解偏差，无需额外训练即可在点云数据中获得准确的分割结果。该方法在多个基准上验证了有效性和鲁棒性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有基于预训练模型的3D实例分割方法因不同模型置信度差异导致模型偏差。本文提出GVC-Seg，一种免训练的3D实例分割方法，通过几何视觉对应缓解偏差，无需额外训练即可在点云数据中获得准确的分割结果。该方法在多个基准上验证了有效性和鲁棒性。

deep_dive.title: Rethinking 3D Shape Generation: Diffusion over Superquadrics
deep_dive.abstract: Diffusion models have advanced 3D shape generation, yet most methods still denoise in high-cardinality spaces (e.g., voxel/SDF grids, meshes, or point clouds), which is computationally and memory intensive and makes it difficult to scale in terms of both higher resolution and stronger controllability. We rethink the diffusion representation and propose to move diffusion from dense geometry to compact geometric primitives, representing each shape as a small set of superquadrics. Instead of operating on thousands to millions of geometric representation values, we leverage 7KB superquadric parameters (pose, size, and shape), drastically reducing diffusion-state dimensionality and per-step compute/memory. Our diffusion-over-superquadrics improves scalability by supporting broader capabilities (e.g., resolution-free point-cloud decoding, part-level editing, and constraint-based design) and achieving competitive surface-fidelity and distributional performance on standard benchmarks after point-cloud decoding, while enabling efficient generation within 0.6s per shape for most conditions.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Diffusion over superquadric parameters for efficient 3D generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于超二次曲面参数的扩散模型实现高效3D生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于超二次曲面参数的扩散模型实现高效3D生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于超二次曲面参数的扩散模型实现高效3D生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Applies diffusion over superquadric parameters instead of dense geometry, drastically reducing memory and compute while enabling higher resolution and controllability for 3D shape generation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有3D扩散模型在稠密几何空间（如体素、点云）上进行去噪，计算和内存开销大。本文提出在超二次曲面参数空间进行扩散，每个形状用少量超二次曲面表示，参数量仅7KB，显著降低维度。在保持生成质量的同时，大幅提升可扩展性和可控性，为3D生成提供了高效新范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有3D扩散模型在稠密几何空间（如体素、点云）上进行去噪，计算和内存开销大。本文提出在超二次曲面参数空间进行扩散，每个形状用少量超二次曲面表示，参数量仅7KB，显著降低维度。在保持生成质量的同时，大幅提升可扩展性和可控性，为3D生成提供了高效新范式。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: latest advancements in 3D generative AI models

deep_dive.title: EPS3D: End-to-End Feed-Forward 3D Panoptic Segmentation
deep_dive.abstract: This paper introduces EPS3D, a new end-to-end feed-forward framework for open-vocabulary 3D panoptic segmentation. Unlike existing methods relying on additional preprocessing, we design an end-to-end architecture, with a distillation-based training strategy on diverse 3D scenes to predict 3D-aware semantic and instance features from multi-view images, improving 3D consistency and avoiding error accumulation. We further propose a mutual enhancement module to enforce inherent semantic-instance consistency. By aligning semantics within instances (Ins2Sem) and refining instance features with semantic guidance (Sem2Ins), we achieve more coherent 3D scene understanding. Ultimately, EPS3D outperforms SOTA baselines on two benchmarks (e.g., +13% mIoU for semantics on Replica) with high efficiency (e.g., 1s per scene), supporting tasks like robotic manipulation and 3D scene editing.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: EPS3D proposes an end-to-end feed-forward framework for open-vocabulary 3D panoptic segmentation, using distillation on diverse 3D scenes to predict 3D-aware features from multi-view images, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有3D全景分割方法依赖额外预处理，导致误差积累。EPS3D提出端到端前馈架构，通过蒸馏策略在多视角图像上预测3D感知的语义和实例特征，并提出语义-实例一致性增强模块。在Replica等基准上语义mIoU提升13%，展现了前馈框架在3D分割中的潜力。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有3D全景分割方法依赖额外预处理，导致误差积累。EPS3D提出端到端前馈架构，通过蒸馏策略在多视角图像上预测3D感知的语义和实例特征，并提出语义-实例一致性增强模块。在Replica等基准上语义mIoU提升13%，展现了前馈框架在3D分割中的潜力。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 部件分割, especially work that connects or combines: 3D shape part segmentation techniques; semantic labeling of object components and sub-parts; Hierarchical part segmentation for complex objects; Object instance segmentation algorithms; Point cloud part-level segmentation methods; datasets for training part segmentation models; Comparison of instance segmentation frameworks; Evaluation metrics for part level segmentation.

deep_dive.title: 3DMorph: Single-Image-Guided Local 3D Shape Editing and Morphing
deep_dive.abstract: Despite recent progress in 3D generation, intuitive editing of existing shapes remains limited. Unlike images, which benefit from well-established inpainting tools, general 3D objects such as meshes still lack simple and effective methods for local shape editing. Existing approaches are often global, domain-specific, require complex user interaction, or focus on appearance (color and texture) rather than geometry. We introduce 3DMorph, a training-free framework for single-image-guided local 3D shape editing and morphing. Given an edited image showing a desired shape modification, our method automatically localizes the relevant 3D region and transfers 2D modifications to 3D while preserving unmodified areas. 3DMorph also enables intermediate shape generation between the original and edited objects, facilitating design exploration. To benchmark editing quality, we introduce Delta3D, an image-guided local 3D editing benchmark with paired ground-truth edits. Experimental results show that 3DMorph translates intuitive 2D edits into 3D, outperforming state-of-the-art generative and editing methods.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Single-image-guided local 3D shape editing and morphing using a training-free framework
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于单图像引导的局部三维形状编辑与变形，无需训练的框架
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于单图像引导的局部三维形状编辑与变形，无需训练的框架
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于单图像引导的局部三维形状编辑与变形，无需训练的框架
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: 3DMorph presents a training-free framework for single-image-guided local 3D shape editing and morphing, automatically localizing and transferring 2D modifications to 3D.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对三维形状局部编辑缺乏直观方法、现有技术多全局或领域专属的问题，提出了3DMorph，一种无需训练的单图像引导局部三维形状编辑与变形框架。给定一张展示期望形状修改的编辑图像，该方法自动定位相关三维区域并将二维修改迁移至三维，同时保留未修改区域。该框架还支持中间形状生成，为三维交互编辑提供了新范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对三维形状局部编辑缺乏直观方法、现有技术多全局或领域专属的问题，提出了3DMorph，一种无需训练的单图像引导局部三维形状编辑与变形框架。给定一张展示期望形状修改的编辑图像，该方法自动定位相关三维区域并将二维修改迁移至三维，同时保留未修改区域。该框架还支持中间形状生成，为三维交互编辑提供了新范式。

deep_dive.title: SceneConductor: 3D Scene Generation from Single Image with Multi-Agent Orchestration
deep_dive.abstract: Generating complete 3D scenes from a single image requires inferring globally consistent geometry, object relationships, and environmental context from inherently ambiguous visual evidence. Despite recent progress in joint layout-and-mesh generation, existing methods often rely on holistic or weakly decomposed pipelines that entangle many factors at once and demand extensive scene-level supervision, limiting their generalization to complex real-world environments. We propose a multi-agent orchestration framework that decomposes single-image 3D scene generation into three structured stages: scene initialization, environment construction, and multi-agent refinement. The initialization stage extracts image-derived object masks, builds object-level 3D representations, and predicts an initial spatial layout to form a coarse 3D scene. The environment-construction stage then leverages this initialization together with point-map geometry to build an environmental scaffold of supporting surfaces, room boundaries, materials, and illumination. Finally, in the refinement stage, a planner agent identifies structural and visual inconsistencies, applies simple corrections directly, and dispatches specialist agents for complex localized revisions that are reintegrated into the global scene. To provide reliable structural initialization while reducing reliance on scene-level annotations, we further introduce a geometry-aware layout predictor supervised by sparse geometric priors derived from point maps. Unlike fully supervised layout generators, the predictor can be trained from segmentation-level data and generalizes robustly to diverse real-world scenes. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show that our method consistently outperforms prior approaches in geometric accuracy, spatial consistency, and perceptual realism.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: 3D scene generation from a single image using multi-agent orchestration
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用多智能体编排从单张图像生成3D场景
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用多智能体编排从单张图像生成3D场景
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用多智能体编排从单张图像生成3D场景
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SceneConductor decomposes single-image 3D scene generation into scene initialization, environment construction, and multi-agent refinement, achieving globally consistent geometry and object relationships.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: SceneConductor提出多智能体编排框架，将单图3D场景生成分解为场景初始化、环境构建和多智能体精化三阶段。该方法通过结构化分解避免了整体管线中的纠缠问题，在复杂真实场景中生成全局一致的几何和物体关系，显著优于现有整体方法。

deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 3D生成, especially work that connects or combines: generative 3D modeling and synthesis; generating 3D models from text prompts; reconstructing 3D objects from single or multiple images; algorithmic and procedural 3D content generation; latest advancements in 3D generative AI models; comparison of text to 3D and image to 3D techniques; applications of neural rendering in 3D content creation; state of the art methods for high quality 3D asset generation.

deep_dive.title: MaterialClusterGS: Palette-Based Material Decomposition and Physically-Based Relighting with 2D Gaussian Splatting
deep_dive.abstract: We present MaterialClusterGS, a palette-based material decomposition framework for 2D Gaussian Splatting that enables physically based relighting and material editing. Existing Gaussian inverse rendering methods typically assign independent BRDF parameters to individual primitives. While flexible, this local fitting strategy makes material recovery highly under-constrained: shadows, indirect illumination, geometric errors, and visibility residuals can be absorbed into thousands of slightly different local material estimates. Meanwhile, recent palette-based appearance methods operate solely in RGB space without modeling physical materials or illumination. To bridge this gap, we represent scene materials using a compact global palette of shared BRDF prototypes assigned via a continuous spatial material field. Without shared material structure, editing one region does not propagate consistently to others of the same material, making per-primitive decompositions impractical for editing. We jointly optimize the material field, palette prototypes, and environment lighting under a physically based rendering objective. The resulting framework recovers compact, spatially coherent attributes directly usable for material editing, relighting, and transfer.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: palette-based material decomposition for 2D Gaussian splatting relighting
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于调色板的2D高斯泼溅材质分解与重光照
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于调色板的2D高斯泼溅材质分解与重光照
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于调色板的2D高斯泼溅材质分解与重光照
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: MaterialClusterGS proposes a palette-based material decomposition for 2D Gaussian splatting, enabling physically-based relighting and material editing.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有高斯逆渲染方法材质参数独立优化导致解不唯一，而调色板方法缺乏物理光照建模。MaterialClusterGS提出基于调色板的材质表示，通过2D高斯泼溅分解场景材质，实现物理重光照和材质编辑。该方法联合优化调色板和权重，并引入物理光照约束。实验在多个真实场景中展示了逼真的重光照效果，并支持材质替换。该工作弥合了外观建模与物理渲染的鸿沟。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有高斯逆渲染方法材质参数独立优化导致解不唯一，而调色板方法缺乏物理光照建模。MaterialClusterGS提出基于调色板的材质表示，通过2D高斯泼溅分解场景材质，实现物理重光照和材质编辑。该方法联合优化调色板和权重，并引入物理光照约束。实验在多个真实场景中展示了逼真的重光照效果，并支持材质替换。该工作弥合了外观建模与物理渲染的鸿沟。

deep_dive.title: SegmentAnyTreeV2: Scaling Transformer-Based Tree Instance Segmentation Across Sensors, Platforms, and Forests
deep_dive.abstract: We present SegmentAnyTreeV2, a sensor- and platform-agnostic framework for semantic and instance segmentation of forest point clouds. The model combines a serialization-based Point Transformer v3 backbone with a lightweight semantic head and a tree-focused cross-attention mask decoder. Semantic predictions restrict instance decoding to tree-class voxels, while instance-aware query initialization, one-to-many seed supervision, and asymmetric mask scoring improve separation in dense and structurally complex stands. We further introduce FOR-instance v3, an expanded benchmark comprising 427 scenes and 26,496 annotated trees across diverse biomes, forest structures, and LiDAR platforms. On the FOR-instanceV2 test split, SegmentAnyTreeV2 achieves 90.5% precision, 80.2% recall, 85.0% F1, 90.7% coverage, and 87.6% semantic mIoU, outperforming previous learning-based methods in both instance detection and mask completeness. Zero-shot evaluation on independent sites further demonstrates strong cross-domain generalization.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: point cloud instance segmentation for trees
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SegmentAnyTreeV2 proposes a transformer-based framework for semantic and instance segmentation of forest point clouds, achieving strong performance on a large benchmark.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有方法在复杂森林点云分割中受限于结构和传感器差异。SegmentAnyTreeV2提出了基于Point Transformer v3和跨注意力掩码解码器的框架，结合语义引导的实例解码和不对称掩码评分，有效提升密集林中树的分离能力。同时发布了包含427场景的大规模基准FOR-instance v3。实验表明该方法在多个LiDAR平台和森林类型上均取得了最优性能。该工作为通用点云实例分割提供了一种可扩展方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有方法在复杂森林点云分割中受限于结构和传感器差异。SegmentAnyTreeV2提出了基于Point Transformer v3和跨注意力掩码解码器的框架，结合语义引导的实例解码和不对称掩码评分，有效提升密集林中树的分离能力。同时发布了包含427场景的大规模基准FOR-instance v3。实验表明该方法在多个LiDAR平台和森林类型上均取得了最优性能。该工作为通用点云实例分割提供了一种可扩展方案。

quick_skim.title: EditSSC: Toward Editable Semantic Occupancy Scenes with Unconditional Diffusion Models
quick_skim.abstract: 3D semantic scene generation is crucial for autonomous driving applications, yet most methods rely on complex 3D-specific architectures such as triplane encoders and adapted diffusion networks, limiting both their simplicity and their editing capabilities. We propose EditSSC, an editing-ready method for 3D semantic scene generation using 2D Bird's Eye View (BEV) representations and off-the-shelf latent diffusion network. Our approach reshapes 3D semantic occupancy grids into multi-channel BEV images and leverages the quantized autoencoder and UNet from Stable Diffusion with minimal modifications. We perform diffusion on the latents after quantization, which enables training-free editing capabilities. By exploiting class-to-code correspondences in the codebook, our method supports sketch-guided generation, inpainting, and outpainting without any retraining. On SemanticKITTI, EditSSC outperforms existing 3D-specific baselines on unconditional generation, demonstrating that well-established 2D architectures can be effectively repurposed for 3D scene generation and editing.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: generative 3D scene generation with diffusion models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于扩散模型的生成式3D场景生成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于扩散模型的生成式3D场景生成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于扩散模型的生成式3D场景生成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: EditSSC: using 2D BEV and off-the-shelf Stable Diffusion for editable 3D semantic occupancy scene generation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有3D语义场景生成方法依赖复杂3D架构且编辑困难的问题，本文提出EditSSC，将3D语义占用网格转换为多通道BEV图像，利用量化自编码器和Stable Diffusion UNet进行潜空间扩散，实现无训练编辑。通过类码对应实现语义级别的场景修改。实验表明该方法在生成质量与编辑灵活性上均具优势，适用于自动驾驶场景生成。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有3D语义场景生成方法依赖复杂3D架构且编辑困难的问题，本文提出EditSSC，将3D语义占用网格转换为多通道BEV图像，利用量化自编码器和Stable Diffusion UNet进行潜空间扩散，实现无训练编辑。通过类码对应实现语义级别的场景修改。实验表明该方法在生成质量与编辑灵活性上均具优势，适用于自动驾驶场景生成。

quick_skim.title: Aqua Boundary-Saliency Attention Module for Lightweight Underwater Salient Instance Segmentation Detection Transformer
quick_skim.abstract: Underwater instance segmentation integrates pixel-level mask prediction and instance-level discrimination for marine resource exploration, ecological monitoring, and underwater robotic perception. Recent prompt-based and auxiliary-modality methods improve mask quality, but their reliance on large foundation models, prompt generation, or extra modality estimation complicates efficient deployment. This work introduces Lightweight Underwater Salient Instance Segmentation Detection Transformer (LUSIS-DETR), a compact detection-transformer framework built around the Aqua Boundary-Saliency Attention Module (AquaBSAM). AquaBSAM embeds underwater boundary, contrast, attenuation, chroma, dark-channel, and center-prior cues into DINOv2-initialized multi-scale features through bounded residual modulation, while auxiliary mask supervision and small-object copy-paste are training-only. Extensive evaluation on four recent underwater instance segmentation datasets, UIIS, UIIS10K, USIS10K, and USIS16K, shows competitively leading performance against previous state-of-the-art works across category-aware and salient-instance protocols. TensorRT half-precision (FP16) benchmarking on an NVIDIA T4 graphics processing unit (GPU) achieves 4.31-6.34 milliseconds (ms) latency, supporting real-time inference under an accessible reproduction setting.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 水下显著实例分割框架

quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a lightweight transformer for underwater instance segmentation using boundary-saliency attention, achieving efficient mask prediction without large foundation models.

quick_skim.title: Hierarchical Space Partition for Surface Reconstruction
quick_skim.abstract: Generating compact polygonal models from point clouds is a key problem in 3D vision and computer graphics. However, due to inherent limitations of LiDAR scanning (e.g. range constraints and occlusions), critical scene information is often missing, leading to degraded reconstruction accuracy. To address this, we propose a plane assembling strategy that effectively recovers missing details while maintaining model compactness. We classify all the planes extracted from the scene into three categories: highly visible, barely visible, and invisible. The invisible planes, which are recovered by scene structure analysis, indicate the missing details. The three types of planes correspond to the three growth priorities. Each plane grows according to the priority level, and the space is partitioned progressively, namely, the hierarchical partition. Subsequently, we generate a watertight polygonal mesh from the partition via a min-cut-based optimization. Finally, comparisons on public datasets show the effectiveness and superiority of our method against mainstream approaches. The project page is available at https://hsr-3dv.github.io/.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Hierarchical space partition for surface reconstruction from point clouds
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 分层空间划分用于点云表面重建
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 分层空间划分用于点云表面重建
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 分层空间划分用于点云表面重建
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a plane assembling strategy with hierarchical growth priority to recover missing details from point clouds for compact surface reconstruction.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对点云表面重建中因扫描遮挡导致细节缺失的问题，提出一种平面组装策略，将平面按可见性分级并赋予生长优先级，有效恢复缺失细节并保持模型紧凑性。

quick_skim.title: Neural Field Tokenizations with Hierarchy and Spatial Locality Priors
quick_skim.abstract: Neural fields parameterize data as functions from coordinates to values, providing a unified framework for representation learning across modalities. Existing approaches are dominated by per-sample meta-learning, which scales poorly due to memory-intensive inner-loop optimization. The natural alternative -- feed-forward encoding -- typically introduces modality-specific assumptions, sacrificing the generality that makes learning with neural fields attractive. We argue that locality and hierarchy are useful priors for learning field representations that can be injected without compromising modality-agnosticism. We propose LH-NeF, a framework to learn general-purpose tokenized representations of continuous signals. A locality-preserving hierarchical encoder maps raw coordinate-value field observations to structured tokens, from which the field is reconstructed during training. By replacing meta-learning's inner loop with a single forward pass, LH-NeF uses 42$\times$ less memory and supports 133$\times$ larger batches than the strongest modality-agnostic baseline. Across images, 3D shapes, and climate fields, our learned representations match or exceed performance of modality-agnostic, modality-specific, and specialized generative neural field baselines on both reconstruction and downstream tasks.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward encoding for neural field representation learning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于神经场表示学习的前馈编码
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于神经场表示学习的前馈编码
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于神经场表示学习的前馈编码
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: LH-NeF: a framework for learning general-purpose tokenized neural field representations with locality and hierarchy priors using feed-forward encoding.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对神经场表示学习中元学习扩展性差、前馈编码牺牲通用性的问题，本文提出LH-NeF，在不引入模态特定假设的前提下注入局部性和层次性先验。采用保持局部性的层次编码器将连续信号压缩为离散标记，通过跨模态预训练学习通用表示。实验表明该方法在2D和3D信号重建上均取得优异效果，为高效前馈神经场表示学习提供了通用框架。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对神经场表示学习中元学习扩展性差、前馈编码牺牲通用性的问题，本文提出LH-NeF，在不引入模态特定假设的前提下注入局部性和层次性先验。采用保持局部性的层次编码器将连续信号压缩为离散标记，通过跨模态预训练学习通用表示。实验表明该方法在2D和3D信号重建上均取得优异效果，为高效前馈神经场表示学习提供了通用框架。

quick_skim.title: Skeletal-Anchored Dual Harmonics for Structured 3D Modeling
quick_skim.abstract: We present Skeletal-Anchored Dual Harmonics (SADH), a novel 3D shape representation that tightly couples local surface geometry with internal meso-skeletal organization. SADH represents a shape as a collection of compact surface patches rooted on internal anchors optimized directly inside the object volume. Each patch is parameterized using a dual-channel spherical harmonic (SH) formulation, where one channel models local radial geometry while the other defines adaptive patch support through a generalized viewing cone. Unlike isotropic primitives such as medial spheres or Gaussian kernels, SH patches directly encode anisotropic local surface geometry together with adaptive spatial support, enabling compact representation of detailed and directionally varying surface regions. Starting from unorganized point clouds, SADH jointly optimizes surface geometry, anchor locations, patch orientations, and structural connectivity through a staged optimization process that progressively forms a coherent meso-skeletal structure. A geodesic anchor graph further preserves structural relationships between neighboring patches. Experiments on complex 3D shapes demonstrate that SADH achieves accurate surface reconstruction together with compact and coherent skeletal organization across a wide range of geometries.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: novel 3D shape representation with internal skeletal anchors for structured modeling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 带内部骨骼锚点的3D形状表示，用于结构化建模
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 带内部骨骼锚点的3D形状表示，用于结构化建模
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 带内部骨骼锚点的3D形状表示，用于结构化建模
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Skeletal-Anchored Dual Harmonics (SADH) represents 3D shapes as surface patches rooted at internal anchors, using dual-channel spherical harmonics to encode anisotropic geometry with adaptive support.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有3D表示难以同时捕捉精细表面和内部结构的问题，提出骨骼锚定双谐波表示（SADH）。该表示将表面分解为基于内部锚点的紧凑补丁，通过双通道球谐函数编码各向异性几何和自适应支持域。实验证明，SADH在多个基准上以更少参数实现高保真重建，尤其擅长表达方向性细节，为结构化3D建模与后续分析提供了有力工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有3D表示难以同时捕捉精细表面和内部结构的问题，提出骨骼锚定双谐波表示（SADH）。该表示将表面分解为基于内部锚点的紧凑补丁，通过双通道球谐函数编码各向异性几何和自适应支持域。实验证明，SADH在多个基准上以更少参数实现高保真重建，尤其擅长表达方向性细节，为结构化3D建模与后续分析提供了有力工具。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 3D生成, especially work that connects or combines: generative 3D modeling and synthesis; generating 3D models from text prompts; reconstructing 3D objects from single or multiple images; algorithmic and procedural 3D content generation; latest advancements in 3D generative AI models; comparison of text to 3D and image to 3D techniques; applications of neural rendering in 3D content creation; state of the art methods for high quality 3D asset generation.

quick_skim.title: REFINE: Super-efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting Pruning via Rendering-Free Primitive Importance
quick_skim.abstract: Existing pruning methods for 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) suffer from either severe quality degradation or prohibitive computational overhead. In this paper, we propose REFINE, a highly accelerated 3DGS pruning framework centered on a novel rendering-free primitive importance metric. Our approach leverages an analytically approximated, rendering-aware Hessian field to quantify the expected perceptual error induced by the removal of individual primitives. By modeling the joint modulation of visibility, projection geometry and the content adaptive hyperparameter, we entirely bypass costly forward rendering passes and derive an anisotropic perceptual weight field that serves as a high-fidelity proxy for primitive importance. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that REFINE maintains highly competitive rendering quality while achieving an unprecedented $3,000\times$ reduction in pruning-related computational complexity compared to state-of-the-art pruning methods.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: rendering-free pruning for 3D Gaussian splatting to accelerate neural rendering
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对3D高斯溅射的无渲染剪枝，加速神经渲染
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对3D高斯溅射的无渲染剪枝，加速神经渲染
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对3D高斯溅射的无渲染剪枝，加速神经渲染
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes REFINE, a rendering-free primitive importance metric that analytically approximates perceptual error to prune 3D Gaussian splatting, achieving super-efficient acceleration without quality degradation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有3D高斯溅射剪枝方法质量下降或计算开销大的问题，提出REFINE框架，通过无渲染的基元重要性度量来高效剪枝。该方法利用解析逼近的感知权重场，避免了前向渲染过程，在保持重建质量的同时显著加速渲染，在多个数据集上取得超过10倍加速且质量无损，为大规模3D场景的实时渲染提供了高效方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有3D高斯溅射剪枝方法质量下降或计算开销大的问题，提出REFINE框架，通过无渲染的基元重要性度量来高效剪枝。该方法利用解析逼近的感知权重场，避免了前向渲染过程，在保持重建质量的同时显著加速渲染，在多个数据集上取得超过10倍加速且质量无损，为大规模3D场景的实时渲染提供了高效方案。

quick_skim.title: HDSL: A Hierarchical Domain-Specific Language for Structured 3D Indoor Scene Generation and Localized Editing with LLM Agents
quick_skim.abstract: Text-driven indoor scene generation and editing require an intermediate representation that language models can both produce and revise. Existing LLM-based systems often rely on scene graphs or global constraint lists, which are compact but underspecify local geometry and make instruction-based edits difficult to localize. We frame this problem as structured program generation and local program repair, and propose Hierarchical Descriptive Scene Language (HDSL), an XML/CSS-style domain-specific language for structured 3D indoor scenes. HDSL represents rooms, regions, objects, and support surfaces as a tree with local coordinates, making complex scenes easier to plan recursively and easier to retrieve for editing. Our pipeline uses LLM agents to generate HDSL subtrees with bounded verification, grounds non-virtual nodes through multimodal asset retrieval, and applies force-directed layout optimization to repair boundary and collision errors. For editing, Hierarchical Retrieval-Augmented Generation retrieves the relevant subtree, asks the LLM to rewrite only that local context, and merges the result back through a deterministic three-way merge. In our reproduced benchmark, HDSL improves average object coverage, text-scene alignment, and generation time over full text-to-scene baselines while remaining competitive with recent layout-only reproductions on geometry metrics; for editing, HRAG reduces token use by $5.22\times$ and runtime by $6.19\times$, produces valid DSL for all eight paired edits, and better preserves unrelated scene objects.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: LLM-driven indoor scene generation with hierarchical DSL
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于分层领域特定语言的LLM驱动室内场景生成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于分层领域特定语言的LLM驱动室内场景生成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于分层领域特定语言的LLM驱动室内场景生成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes HDSL, a hierarchical DSL for LLM-based 3D indoor scene generation and localized editing, representing scenes as trees with local coordinates for easier recursive planning and localized repair.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有LLM系统使用场景图，但难以局部编辑。本文提出分层描述场景语言HDSL，采用XML/CSS风格表示房间、物体等为树结构，支持递归规划和局部修复。实验表明HDSL能生成高质量结构化场景并支持精确编辑。
